who: restaurant general managers managing 5-15 staff members
offer: For restaurant general managers managing 5-15 staff members, inefficient labor scheduling causes overstaffing or understaffing. We automate labor forecasting and scheduling instead of manual scheduling and labor forecasting.
problem: inefficient labor scheduling leading to overstaffing or understaffing
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling solutions
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant management
try_it: Let users try simple labor forecasting tool for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Gather 10 short interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Default settings for reminders and notifications
Allow CSV import for existing staff data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
